# willitsend

Preflight for outbound SMS/iMessage. Deterministic lint that catches silent
carrier filtering, segment blowups, and dropped iMessage features before a
message is sent. No API key. Every rule cites its source.

## Install (MCP)

Claude Code: `claude mcp add willitsend -- npx -y -p github:abryfs/willitsend willitsend-mcp`
Other MCP clients: {"command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "-p", "github:abryfs/willitsend", "willitsend-mcp"]}

## Use

Before every send_message (or equivalent) call, call preflight_message with the
draft body, is_first_message_to_contact (true/false when known), and brand_name.
Verdicts: pass = send; warn = send with named risks; block = do not send, apply
each finding's fix verbatim and re-run; needs_context = determine whether this
is a first message (check conversation history) and re-run. Never treat
needs_context as permission to send.

## Links

- Repo + full docs: https://github.com/abryfs/willitsend
- Playground: https://abryfs.github.io/willitsend/
- Library: npm install github:abryfs/willitsend (import { preflight } from "willitsend")
